note: Sample / development data only. Replace with production datasets before deployment. See productionReplacement field for authoritative data sources.

layers.name: Protected Areas (Sample — 8 major sanctuaries)
layers.description: Simplified bounding-box polygons for 8 major Indian national parks and wildlife sanctuaries in wind-energy states. Not for legal or survey use.
layers.attribution: Sample data — simplified extents. Production: MoEFCC PA Network + WDPA

layers.name: Wind Resource Grid 100m (Sample — 10 zones)
layers.description: Indicative 1°×1° wind resource grid cells over major Indian wind energy states with sample Weibull parameters. Values are illustrative — not from NIWE atlas.
layers.attribution: Sample data only. Production: NIWE Wind Atlas / Vortex / AWS Truepower
layers.productionReplacement: https://niwe.res.in — NIWE Wind Atlas for India (100m hub height)

layers.name: Default Exclusion Zone Templates
layers.description: Empty FeatureCollection with the full exclusion zone schema. Use as a starting template when drawing exclusion zones for a new project.
